nodes.label: Unit tests for the runner-side ``upload_file`` dispatch containment.  These cove
Build an AP-server client that records requests and returns a     created-file r
An ``upload_file`` path that escapes the workspace is rejected and     no upload
A workspace-local symlink that points at a host file outside the     workspace i
An ``upload_file`` path inside the workspace uploads the file's raw     bytes an
A parent-spec stub declaring one ``worker`` sub-agent (no harness CLI).
Build a mock Omnigent-server handler for a fresh named spawn.      Serves the no
An enriched copy-response mapping entry for one file.
Dispatch one ``sys_session_send`` against ``handler`` and clean up.
One ``file_ids`` entry copies parent→child, then the child events     content ca
An ``image/*`` content type yields an ``input_image`` block.
A copied file with no content_type falls back to the filename guess.
Multiple file_ids produce one block each, in request order, mapped.
A plain-string send (no file_ids) posts a single input_text block and     never
Malformed file_ids are rejected before child lookup or copy.
Named sends only copy files when they create the child session.
A copy that 404s (e.g. a hallucinated file id) surfaces an error to     the pare
A failed spawn reports when teardown cannot delete the child.
A copy that succeeds but a child events POST that then fails must     tear down
A message-post failure reports teardown transport failures too.
